---
pagetitle: Admin Selectors (MultiSelect)
created: "2025-11-25"
updated: "2026-03-04"
---

<!--
Include with:
`{{< include /components/_adminSelectorsMulti.qmd >}}`

Requires:
- helpers/enhancedMultiSelect.ojs
- components/_lang.qmd
-->

```{ojs}
adminDB = await DuckDBClient.of({
  admin_lookup: await FileAttachment("/data/shared/gaul24_africa_lookup.parquet"),
});
```

```{ojs}
// ADMIN 0
countries = {
  const country_list = await FileAttachment("/data/shared/atlas_countries.json").json();
  const filteredCountries = country_list
    .filter((c) => c.include && c.iso3c !== "SDN")
    .map(({ include, ...rest }) => rest);
  return filteredCountries;
};

// Default admin0 selection: Kenya if available, otherwise first country
defaultAdmin0 = {
  const kenya = (countries ?? []).find((d) => d && d.iso3c === "KEN");
  return kenya ? [kenya] : (countries ?? []).slice(0, 1);
}

viewof admin0Select = Inputs.input(defaultAdmin0)

renderA0Multi = ({ maxSelections = Infinity, requireAtLeastOne = false } = {}) => {
  const _admin0 = Inputs.select(countries, {
    label: _lang(general_translations.country),
    format: (d) => _lang(d.translation),
    multiple: true
  });

  enhancedMultiSelect(_admin0, { maxSelections, requireAtLeastOne });

  return Inputs.bind(_admin0, viewof admin0Select);
}
```

```{ojs}
// ADMIN 1 (Regions)
dataAdmin1 = {
  const isoList = (admin0Select ?? []).map((d) => d.iso3c).filter(Boolean);
  if (!isoList.length) return [];

  const regions = await adminDB.query(`
    SELECT DISTINCT admin0_name, admin1_name, iso3
    FROM admin_lookup
    WHERE iso3 in ('${isoList.join("', '")}')
    ORDER BY iso3, admin1_name
  `);

  // Full Country rows (one per selected country)
  const countryRows = (admin0Select ?? []).map((d) => ({
    admin0_name: d.admin0_name,
    admin1_name: null,
    iso3: d.iso3c,
    admin1_value: null,
    admin1_label: `Full Country (${d.iso3c})`
  }));

  const regionRows = (regions ?? []).map((r) => ({
    ...r,
    admin1_value: r.admin1_name,
    admin1_label: `${r.admin1_name} (${r.iso3})`
  }));

  // Group by ISO, alphabetize (case-insensitive)
  const byIso = new Map();
  for (const r of regionRows) {
    const iso = String(r.iso3 ?? "");
    if (!byIso.has(iso)) byIso.set(iso, []);
    byIso.get(iso).push(r);
  }
  for (const [iso, rows] of byIso.entries()) {
    rows.sort((a, b) =>
      String(a.admin1_name ?? "").localeCompare(String(b.admin1_name ?? ""), undefined, { sensitivity: "base" })
    );
  }

  const countriesSorted = [...countryRows].sort((a, b) =>
    String(a.iso3 ?? "").localeCompare(String(b.iso3 ?? ""))
  );

  const out = [];
  for (const c of countriesSorted) {
    const iso = String(c.iso3 ?? "");
    out.push(c);
    out.push(...(byIso.get(iso) ?? []));
    byIso.delete(iso);
  }
  for (const iso of Array.from(byIso.keys()).sort((a, b) => String(a).localeCompare(String(b)))) {
    out.push(...(byIso.get(iso) ?? []));
  }

  return out;
}

viewof admin1Select = Inputs.input([])

renderA1Multi = ({ maxSelections = Infinity, requireAtLeastOne = false } = {}) => {
  const _admin1 = Inputs.select(dataAdmin1, {
    label: _lang(general_translations.region),
    format: (d) => d.admin1_label ?? `${d.admin1_name || "Full Country"} (${d.iso3})`,
    multiple: true
  });

  enhancedMultiSelect(_admin1, {
    maxSelections,
    requireAtLeastOne,
    enableFullCountryToggle: true,
    fullCountryPrefix: "Full Country"
  });

  const bound = Inputs.bind(_admin1, viewof admin1Select);

  queueMicrotask(() => {
    if (globalThis.__hz_defaultAdmin1Applied) return;

    const a0 = Array.isArray(admin0Select) ? admin0Select : (admin0Select ? [admin0Select] : []);
    if (a0.length !== 1) return;

    const iso = String(a0[0]?.iso3c ?? a0[0]?.iso3 ?? a0[0]?.iso ?? "");
    if (iso !== "KEN") return;

    const current = Array.isArray(_admin1.value) ? _admin1.value : (_admin1.value ? [_admin1.value] : []);
    if (current.length) return;

    const expanded = (Array.isArray(dataAdmin1) ? dataAdmin1 : []).filter(
      (d) => d && String(d.iso3 ?? d.iso3c ?? d.iso ?? "") === "KEN"
    );
    if (!expanded.length) return;

    globalThis.__hz_defaultAdmin1Applied = true;

    const node = _admin1.querySelector?.("select") ?? _admin1;
    _admin1.value = expanded;
    node.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true }));
  });

  return bound;
}
```

```{ojs}
// ADMIN 2 (Districts)
dataAdmin2 = {
  const isoList = (admin0Select ?? []).map((d) => d.iso3c).filter(Boolean);
  if (!isoList.length) return [];

  // Only fetch districts when at least one region is selected
  const a1 = (admin1Select ?? [])
    .map((d) => d.admin1_value ?? d.admin1_name)
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (!a1.length) return [];

  // Escape apostrophes for SQL IN (...) lists (e.g., Murang'a)
  const esc = (s) => String(s).replaceAll("'", "''");
  const a1Esc = a1.map(esc);

  const rows = await adminDB.query(`
    SELECT DISTINCT admin0_name, admin1_name, admin2_name, iso3
    FROM admin_lookup
    WHERE iso3 in ('${isoList.join("', '")}')
    AND admin1_name in ('${a1Esc.join("', '")}')
    ORDER BY admin2_name
  `);

  const out = (rows ?? []).map((r) => ({
    ...r,
    admin2_value: r.admin2_name,
    admin2_label: `${r.admin2_name} (${r.iso3})`
  }));

  // Ensure alphabetical order
  out.sort((a, b) =>
    String(a.admin2_name ?? "").localeCompare(String(b.admin2_name ?? ""), undefined, { sensitivity: "base" })
  );

  return out;
}

viewof admin2Select = Inputs.input([])

renderA2Multi = ({ maxSelections = Infinity, requireAtLeastOne = false } = {}) => {
  const _admin2 = Inputs.select(dataAdmin2, {
    label: _lang(general_translations.district),
    format: (d) => d.admin2_label ?? `${d.admin2_name} (${d.iso3})`,
    multiple: true
  });

  enhancedMultiSelect(_admin2, { maxSelections, requireAtLeastOne });

  return Inputs.bind(_admin2, viewof admin2Select);
}
```
